schemas.name: LuckyNumberResponse
schemas.description: Response payload returned after evaluating the submitted number

fields.name: number
fields.description: The number submitted by the user

fields.name: is_lucky
fields.description: True if number matches the prefixed lucky number, False otherwise

fields.name: message
fields.description: Lucky if matched, Better luck next time if not

services.name: LuckyNumberService
services.description: Handles business logic for lucky number evaluation

LUCKY_NUMBER.description: The prefixed number to compare user input against

methods.name: check_lucky_number
methods.description: Compares input number against the configured LUCKY_NUMBER
logic: If number == LUCKY_NUMBER: set is_lucky=True, message='Lucky'
Else: set is_lucky=False, message='Better luck next time'
Return LuckyNumberResponse with number, is_lucky, message

apis.summary: Check if the submitted number is the lucky number

path_params.name: number
path_params.description: Positive integer to check against the prefixed lucky number

status_codes.422: Validation error — non-numeric input or failed constraint
